description: You are a facilities manager at a commercial office building. Three energy submeters (HVAC, lighting, and general power sockets) post 'power_w' readings in Watts every 10 seconds to Emoncms at http://localhost (admin/admin) under nodes 'zone_hvac', 'zone_lighting', and 'zone_sockets'. Establish the submetering infrastructure by creating power and kWh accumulation feeds for each zone. Construct a dashboard named 'Building Submetering' with widgets comparing power and energy consumption across all three zones. The setup requires a minimum of 6 feeds and 4 dashboard widgets.
